---
title: "Oceanography"
subtitle: "Physical and chemical properties of the world's oceans and their geographic significance."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---





Welcome to the **Oceanography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores the physical, chemical, and biological dynamics of the world's oceans — covering ocean floor topography, water masses, currents, tides, and the marine environment.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Relief of Oceans.**
* **Composition: Temperature, Density and Salinity.**
* **Circulation: Warm and Cold Currents, Waves, Tides.**
* **Sea Level Changes.**
* **Hazards: Tsunami and Cyclone.**

---

{{< include oceanography/bottom-relief-of-indian-atlantic-and-pacific-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/bottom-topography-of-the-atlantic-indian-and-pacific-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/coral-reefs-coral-bleaching.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/course-content.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/density-of-seawater.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/heat-and-salt-budgets.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/law-of-the-sea-and-marine-pollution.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/marine-resources.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/ocean-climate-interaction.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/ocean-currents.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/ocean-deposits.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/ocean-floor-topography.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/origin-of-ocean-basins.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/sea-level-changes.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/temperature-and-salinity-of-the-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/temperature-salinity.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/waves-currents-and-tides.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/waves-tides.md >}}
